productionRule: Only deploy modules that have survived Vercel production build verification.

excludedFromProduction.reason: Failed Vercel deployment when wired into production. Must be debugged and graduated from experimental build first.
Depends on thesis path and failed when wired with thesis. Must be debugged after thesis stabilizes.
Previous regex-based reordering destabilized build. Must be moved into source homepage builder before production use.
